'''Kanti''' was a city on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==History==
Established on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] in the [[Perave system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region, Kanti saw notoriety in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] when it was host to the [[Colonies region Dejarik tournament|Regional Dejarik Championship]]. During the quarter-final match between [[Ohh Bronna]] and [[Corwin Kaezeb]], Bronna, the sector champion, was suddenly defeated by Kaezeb. Shocked by the defeat Bronna, an [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssin]], attacked the [[Siniteen/Legends|Siniteen]] challenger which escalated into a six-player brawl. Meanwhile, players [[Garem Will]] and [[D'nisenz]] ignored the fighting and continued playing, leading to D'nisenz to be named the Colonies champion.<ref name="HNN51" />

{{City-stub}}
